overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit urban environment. The player moves through a covered pedestrian walkway with curved glass roofing, exits onto a city street with towering buildings and digital billboards, then ascends stairs to an elevated plaza with trees and vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with neon advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing illuminated billboards and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking ahead of the camera along the walkway

entered.detail: arched transparent roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
tall concrete building facade with mounted digital screens
large screen displaying morning news broadcast with white text
purple and blue neon advertisement with stylized text
red and yellow automated food vendor with neon trim

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered pedestrian walkway with a curved glass canopy overhead. The player walks forward past concrete walls covered in glowing digital billboards and neon signs, including a prominent purple advertisement. The environment is bathed in artificial neon light with a few pedestrians walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with elevated highway and commercial buildings

events.description: exits the covered walkway into open air, revealing the sky and surrounding cityscape
turns left to follow the sidewalk along the main building facade

agents.ego_description: turning left onto the open sidewalk and continuing past commercial buildings and street vendors

notable_agents.action: red car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building with green-tinted windows and yellow structural elements
tall digital screen displaying advertisements on the building corner
elevated roadway or monorail track crossing above the street
red automated vendor with illuminated product display

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a bustling urban street with a visible sky transitioning from blue to dusk. The player turns left along a sidewalk bordered by a green commercial building covered in massive digital billboards. An elevated highway structure spans overhead while pedestrians and vehicles move through the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to upper pedestrian level

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs to the upper plaza level

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs flanked by yellow pillars and digital billboards

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with yellow structural pillars on the sides
bright yellow support column with mounted signage

segments.scene_description: The player approaches and begins climbing a wide concrete stairway leading upward. The environment becomes more enclosed with yellow structural pillars and large digital screens visible on the walls. The stairway is relatively empty with no other pedestrians in immediate view.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with glass canopy and trees

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs entering the elevated plaza with trees and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking around the upper plaza, passing trees and vending machines under the glass canopy

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking across the plaza near the far end

entered.detail: transparent curved roof structure covering the elevated plaza area
mature tree growing from a large rectangular planter in the plaza center
group of red and black automated vendors with illuminated displays
bright yellow waste containers with black lids

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the player enters an elevated pedestrian plaza covered by a glass canopy. The area features a large central tree in a planter, clusters of vending machines, and yellow trash bins. The space is relatively quiet with scattered pedestrians visible in the distance under the mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit pedestrian corridor into the expansive scale of a bustling futuristic city street. It begins within a covered walkway under a curved glass canopy, moving past concrete walls adorned with glowing digital billboards and a prominent purple advertisement. As the camera advances, the enclosed space opens up into a wide urban thoroughfare where the artificial neon glow gives way to a dusk sky transitioning from blue to dark. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left along a sidewalk, passing a green commercial building draped in massive digital displays beneath the heavy shadow of an overhead elevated highway.

The shot follows a continuous ascent from a confined concrete stairwell into a spacious, light-filled elevated plaza. It begins as the camera climbs a wide concrete stairway, moving past yellow structural pillars and large digital screens that create an enclosed, industrial atmosphere. As the player reaches the top of the stairs, the narrow surroundings open up into a wide pedestrian area sheltered by a sweeping glass canopy. The scene then expands to reveal a central tree in a planter and clusters of vending machines, while the lighting shifts from the dimness of the stairwell to a mix of natural and artificial glow. Finally, the camera glides through the quiet plaza, passing yellow trash bins and scattered pedestrians in the distance.
